steps.title: Recognize the perfect square on the right side
steps.content:
The equation is $x^2 = (22)(22)$. The right side is the product of two equal factors, which forms a perfect square: $(22)(22) = 22^2$. Rewrite the equation as:
$$x^2 = 22^2$$

steps.title: Take the positive square root to solve for x
steps.content:
Taking the positive square root of both sides:
$$\sqrt{x^2} = \sqrt{22^2}$$
$$x = 22$$
